name: 巨人情報站｜RSS 收集管線

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { title: { stringValue: String($json.title).slice(0, 500) }, link: { stringValue: $json.link }, source: { stringValue: $json.source }, aiSummary: { stringValue: String($json.summary).slice(0, 2000) }, angles: { arrayValue: { values: ($json.angles || []).map(a => ({ stringValue: String(a) })) } }, score: { integerValue: String($json.score) }, pubDate: { stringValue: $json.pubDate }, createdAt: { timestampValue: $now.toISO() }, state: { stringValue: 'new' }, fullText: { stringValue: '' }, translation: { stringValue: '' } } }) }}
